name: giveabit-hq
description: Give A Bit HQ — static ops & pitch deck for Cloudflare Pages

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp control-panel.html public/index.html && cp projects.json agents.json status.example.json public/ && cp pages/_headers pages/_redirects public/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./public --project-name=giveabit-hq
